infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Pocket Check uses your location to remind you to verify your belongings when you've been stationary.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Pocket Check uses your location in the background to remind you to check your pockets when leaving a location.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Pocket Check uses your location to remind you to verify your belongings when you've been stationary.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Pocket Check uses background location to remind you to check your pockets when leaving a location.
